intro:
I couldn't find any information on the plant × Elyhordeum pilosilemma. It's possible that this is a made-up or incorrect name for a plant. However, I can provide information on the plant Elymus pilosus.

Elymus pilosus is a species of grass native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions, due to its potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Elymus pilosus include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. The most common herbal preparations made with Elymus pilosus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat digestive issues and promote wound healing.
